Each importer handles extraction, field mapping, and data import end to end. You don't need to write export scripts or manually map fields."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Supported agentic fallback. Mnemosyne generates the exact migration script or AI agent prompt you need."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Quick Start"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Import from Mem0\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx\n\n# Dry run first (validate but don't write)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from mem0 --api-key sk-xxx --dry-run\n\n# Import from a JSON export file\nhermes mnemosyne import --input ./export.json\n\n# List all supported providers\nhermes mnemosyne import --list-providers\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Every importer follows the same pipeline:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extract"}]," — Pull all memories from the source provider (SDK, REST API, or file)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Validate"}]," — Check that extracted data has the required fields"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transform"}]," — Map provider-specific fields to Mnemosyne's format"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Import"}]," — Write into working memory with identity metadata preserved"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"All metadata, timestamps, user/agent identity, and original IDs are preserved in the import."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Preservation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Imported memories keep their original author identity:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mem0"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]," and ","$L3"," become ","$L4"]}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n"]}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le"],["$Lf"],"$L10"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"a7Z8buxtE-LVtBntTgeEr"}

c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Generate a migration script\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --generate-script\n\n# Generate AI agent instructions (give these to your AI)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --agentic\n\n# Save the generated script to a file\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --output-script ./migrate_zep.py\n"}]}]
